description: Create a gaze-contingent spotlight experiment in PsychoPy Builder. A 'spotlight' task restricts the visible area of the screen to a small window that moves with the user's gaze (simulated here with the mouse cursor), forcing serial processing of visual information. The experiment must include a loop that references a conditions CSV file for the three images located in /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/stimuli/. The visible aperture should be 150 pixels (or 0.2 height units) and must track the mouse position continuously. Save the experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/spotlight_search.psyexp.
